title: Test case 1: Verify that the createAccount method creates a new user account
preconditions: ["The user is on the RegisterActivity screen"]
test_steps: ["Enter valid email and password in the EditText fields", "Click the createAccount button"]
expected_result: ["The user account is created successfully and the user is redirected to the LoginActivity screen"]
